phrases.intent_en: Ask where the port area entrance is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde está la entrada para la zona del puerto?
phrases.pronunciation: ¿DOHN-deh es-TAH lah en-TRAH-dah PAH-rah lah SOH-nah del PWEHR-toh?

likely_response.local: Al final del paseo, hacia el mar.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL fee-NAHL DEHL pah-SEH-oh ah-THEE-ah EHL MAHR
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the walk, towards the sea.

responses.english: At the end of the walk, towards the sea.
responses.phonetic: AHL fee-NAHL DEHL pah-SEH-oh ah-THEE-ah EHL MAHR
responses.french: Al final del paseo, hacia el mar.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the beach access is
phrases.text_local: ¿Disculpe, por dónde se baja a la playa del Postiguet?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, por DOHN-deh seh BAH-hah ah lah PLAH-yah dehl pohs-tee-GEHT

likely_response.local: Siga recto hasta el final del paseo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah REHTH-toh AH-stah EHL fee-NAHL DEHL pah-SEH-oh
likely_response.translation_en: Go straight to the end of the promenade.

responses.english: Go straight to the end of the promenade.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah REHTH-toh AH-stah EHL fee-NAHL DEHL pah-SEH-oh
responses.french: Siga recto hasta el final del paseo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where ice cream vendors are
phrases.text_local: ¿Sabe dónde hay puestos de helados por aquí cerca?
phrases.pronunciation: SAH-bay DOHN-day EYE PWEHS-tohs deh eh-LAH-dohs por ah-KEE SEHR-kah?

likely_response.local: Hay varios quioscos a lo largo del paseo.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHY bah-REE-ohs k-ee-OH-skohs AH LOH LAHR-goh DEHL pah-SEH-oh
likely_response.translation_en: There are several kiosks along the promenade.

responses.english: There are several kiosks along the promenade.
responses.phonetic: AHY bah-REE-ohs k-ee-OH-skohs AH LOH LAHR-goh DEHL pah-SEH-oh
responses.french: Hay varios quioscos a lo largo del paseo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which way to Barrio de Santa Cruz
phrases.text_local: ¿Podría indicarme cómo llegar al barrio de Santa Cruz?
phrases.pronunciation: pohd-RÍ-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh KÓ-moh yeh-GAHR AHL bahr-REE-oh DEH SAHN-tah KROOTH

likely_response.local: Suba por la calle San Francisco, arriba.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah POHR LAH KAHL-leh SAHN frahn-THEE-skoh ahr-REE-bah
likely_response.translation_en: Go up San Francisco street, towards the top.

responses.english: Go up San Francisco street, towards the top.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah POHR LAH KAHL-leh SAHN frahn-THEE-skoh ahr-REE-bah
responses.french: Suba por la calle San Francisco, arriba.
